Our Services

Everything You Need,
All Under One Roof

EM Services is your single point of contact for the entire South African police clearance process — from fingerprint capture through to final delivery.

🖐

Certified Fingerprint Capture

Elanza is a Forensic Insight verified technician and captures your fingerprints personally as part of the EM Services process — no separate appointments needed.

  • Forensic Insight verified technician
  • SAPS-compliant digital capture
  • Flexible Christchurch scheduling
  • Quality-checked before submission
📋

SAPS Clearance Coordination

Full documentation preparation, application filing, and direct SAPS submission. We manage every form, every requirement, every step — so you don't have to.

  • Application & form preparation
  • Passport copy management
  • Direct SAPS submission
  • Status updates throughout
📦

Delivery & Certification

Upon completion, receive a digital copy immediately and a hard-copy original by post. Both included in your all-inclusive fee — no hidden extras.

  • Digital copy on completion
  • Hard-copy posted to you
  • Suitable for all OECD countries
  • Multi-clearance discounts available

Meet Your Coordinator

Elanza Muller

Owner · EM Services

✓ Forensic Insight Verified Technician
🖐 Certified Fingerprint Capture

Elanza Muller is the owner and sole operator of EM Services, Christchurch's specialist SAPS police clearance coordinator. A South African expat herself, Elanza understands exactly what South Africans living in New Zealand need when applying for police clearances — and the frustrations of navigating the process alone.

As a verified technician through Forensic Insight, Elanza personally captures your fingerprints as part of the service — meaning one point of contact handles everything from first appointment to final delivery.

Based at 108 McCormacks Bay Road, Mount Pleasant, Christchurch — and available by WhatsApp, phone, or email to answer your questions at any stage of the process.

Certified fingerprint technician through Forensic Insight Ltd, NZ's leading forensic services body.

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know before getting started. Still have questions? WhatsApp Elanza directly.

Does Elanza take my fingerprints herself?

+

Yes. Elanza Muller is a Forensic Insight verified fingerprint technician and personally captures your fingerprints as part of the EM Services process. There is no separate third-party technician to arrange — it's all managed by Elanza.

How long does SAPS clearance take from NZ?

+

Standard processing is approximately 6 weeks from the date fingerprints are received and submitted to SAPS. A fast-track option is available for approximately 10 working days (at an additional cost of $250 per person). Note that SAPS processing timelines are ultimately governed by the South African Police Service and may vary.

How much does it cost?

+

1 clearance is $250. 2 clearances are $280. Prices are all-inclusive of GST, the SAPS application fee, and return postage. There are no hidden extras. Fast-track is an additional $250 per person on top of the standard fee.

Do I need to travel to South Africa?

+

No. Everything is handled in Christchurch. Your fingerprints are captured locally by Elanza, documentation is prepared here, and applications are submitted directly to SAPS on your behalf. There is nothing you need to do in South Africa.

What do I need to provide?

+

You'll need a copy of your valid passport and to attend a fingerprint appointment with Elanza in Christchurch. Elanza will provide you with a full checklist when you make contact — everything else is managed for you.

What if I'm not in Christchurch?

+

Elanza can assist with coordinating fingerprint capture through NZ Fingerprints' nationwide network, or refer you to your nearest certified provider. She then handles all SAPS documentation and submission from Christchurch regardless of where you are in New Zealand.

Which countries accept SAPS clearance?

+

SAPS clearance is accepted for New Zealand, Australia, United Kingdom, Canada, UAE, Singapore, and most OECD countries. Elanza will advise on specific country format requirements as part of the process.

I have an urgent deadline — can you help?

+

Yes. WhatsApp Elanza directly with your deadline and she'll advise on the best option. Fast-track includes priority fingerprint scheduling, expedited documentation preparation, and prioritised SAPS submission — approximately 10 working days for an additional $250 per person.
